description: Unit tests for the FocusTrap utility class, testing focus management behaviors such as activation, deactivation, and focus wrapping within a DOM element.

classes.name: FocusTrap
classes.description: A utility class managing focus trapping behavior within a specified DOM element.

methods.name: activate
methods.description: Activates focus trap, optionally focusing inside the trap and handling focus cycling.

methods.name: deactivate
methods.description: Deactivates focus trap, removing event listeners and restoring state.
